title: 3PCS Baby Floral Headbands Girl Flower Nylon Lace Petals Hairband Delicate Cute Stretchy Pearl Baby Headband Hair Accessories Headband for Baby Girls Newborns Infants Toddlers Infant Kids White Pink
features: Premium Material: These Baby girl floral headbands are made of nylon/lace elastic band, water soluble lace, gauze flowers, faux pearls and rhinestones, which is soft, skin friendly, breathable and can be worn all year round.

Cute & Fashion: The stylish baby white headband is decorated with chiffon flowers and hand-stitched faux pearls and diamonds in pink and white, creating a beautiful look for your baby and making her even more adorable and charming.

Wide Application: The white baby headband are perfect for everyday use, birthday, parties, weddings, shows, photo shoots and all kinds of festivals. White and pink are sweet, versatile colours that go well with any colour outfit.

Elastic: The baby girl hair accessories is super stretchy and stretches to a circumference of up to about 50 cm. It will not leave strangulation marks on your child's head. A lovely flower hairband for newborns, babies and children up to 6 years old.
Soft & Comfortable: You will receive soft 3 cute baby girl white flower headband made of high quality fabric, very comfortable to wear and touch.
